title: End Dimension Control
description: A plugin for paper/spigot/bukkit which allows you to take control of the end dimension, such as enabling and disabling it and some more features.
body:
- # End Dimension Control
- ## How Can I Use This Plugin?
> - **Inside Your Plugins Folder There Should Be The DataFolder Generated By The Plugin Which Inside Of It Will Include The Configuration Of The Plugin, And The Whitelist File Which You Can Add People That Can Go To The End Even When End Is Disabled!**

- ## Commands
> - **/endenable - Which Can Be Used To Easily Enable The End.**
> - **/enddisable - Which Can Be Used To Easily Disable The End.**
> - **/ewplayerlist - Which Shows The Whitelisted Players For The End Dimension Which Are Allowed To Go To The End Even When The End Dimension Is Disabled.**
> - **/ewenable - Which Can Be Used To Easily Enable The End Whitelist Feature.**
> - **/ewdisable - Which Can Be Used To Easily Disable The End Whitelist Feature.**
> - **/ewadd <player> - Which Can Be Used To Easily Add A Player To The End Whitelist.**
> - **/ewremove <player> - Which Can Be Used To Easily Remove A Player From The End Whitelist.**

- ## Manual Configuration Info & Help
> - **The "EndEnabled" Option Means If The End Should Be Enabled Or Disabled At The Moment, Setting It To false Will Disable The End And Setting It To true Will Enable It!**

- ## Manual Whitelisting Info & Help
> - **For Each Player Thats Whitelist Just Add The Player Names 1 By 1 Meaning Only 1 Player Name Can Be Put In Each Line!**

- ## Features
> - **Enables/Disables The End Dimension (Very Usefull For SMP Servers).**
> - **Has Sounds And Messages Up On Such Events That This Plugin Handles.**
> - **Has The Ability To Add Whitelisted Players To The End Dimension Which Can Be Usefull If The Operators Wants To Disable The End For Other Members And Only Let Them Be Able To Go Into The End.**
